description: Generator/parser roundtrip-lossiness fixes surfaced by checkRoundtrip: (1) parser SKIP_STATUSES phase-override rewrites sub-item rows, losing mixed item statuses under a rolled-up COMPLETE/PARKED phase; (2) malformed feature codes (e.g. lowercase) cause row duplication + non-convergence. Both are pre-existing gen/parse defects, not roadmap drift.
